financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company did really well this quarter, doing better than expected in all areas.
They are growing in important parts of their business and have no major problems, which is a good sign for the future.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well by finding new markets to sell to, even with challenges like U.S. tariffs.
They have a good amount of debt compared to their earnings, but some experts are still cautious about their future outlook.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay in managing its environmental impact but has room for improvement.
Its leadership and decision-making practices are decent, but there's still some work to be done.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently because they had good financial results and achieved important goals.
They were mostly positive but showed some caution when talking about future credit ratings and financial predictions.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company was clear about their plans and operations but didn't share much about their finances.
Some answers were supported by data, but many were just general statements without detailed numbers.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing really well, with strong growth in its international business areas.
Leaders are confident about the future, and experts believe the company will keep improving financially.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well financially, with more money coming in and smart investments that are paying off.
However, they need to be careful with their spending plans to avoid taking on too much debt.
